mapper.select: /* RoleMapper.findAllActiveRoles */ SELECT ROLE_ID AS roleId , ROLE_NAME AS roleName , ROLE_CODE AS roleCode , USE_YN AS useYn FROM ROLE WHERE USE_YN = 'Y' ORDER BY ROLE_ID ASC

SELECT R.ROLE_ID AS roleId , R.ROLE_CODE AS roleCode , R.ROLE_NAME AS roleName , R.USE_YN AS useYn FROM ROLE R
ORDER BY
R.ROLE_CODE R.ROLE_NAME R.USE_YN R.ROLE_ID
ASC DESC
LIMIT #{safeSize} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT R.ROLE_ID AS roleId , R.ROLE_CODE AS roleCode , R.ROLE_NAME AS roleName , R.USE_YN AS useYn FROM ROLE R WHERE R.ROLE_ID = #{roleId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ROLE (ROLE_CODE, ROLE_NAME, USE_YN, CRT_DT, UPD_DT) VALUES (#{roleCode}, #{roleName}, #{useYn}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE ROLE SET USE_YN = 'N' , UPD_DT = NOW() WHERE ROLE_ID = #{roleId}
